violations.text: Establishment does not have a handwashing sink that is conveniently located in the deli service area where deli meats are sliced. Establishment must install a handwashing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2024

Establishment is not in compliance with their HACCP procedures for making soupy. Establishment is not recording the temperature of the soupy drying room 5 days a week and are not recording the temperature of storage cooler at least once a day. Establishment must start recording temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Food (dough, pizza slices, whole pizza, and bread), packaged in the establishment did not have the required label information. Items were removed from the shelves and must not be sold on shelves until labels are made. Per person in charge, food will not be sold as self-service and will be sold behind the counter until labels are made. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
The door to the outside, screen on window, and door screen are not tight-fitting. Points of entry must be tight-fitting to prevent pest entry. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
